description: Remove volume confirmation filter to reduce entry condition stack and increase trade count (simpler signal, fewer constraints when no prior trades recorded).
Relax ADX threshold from 25 to 20 to allow more entry opportunities while retaining momentum filter (widen entry set for improved trade frequency without removing filter entirely).

Remove vol_regime_high entry filter (ATR > ATR_MA) — ADX+DI already confirm trend strength/direction; this redundant volatility-expansion condition cuts trade count too close to the 20-trade floor, ri
Fix crash: re-add missing `atr_ma_period` attribute removed by prior commit; required by init() for trailing stop regime logic.
Re-add Donchian short-exit rail at 10-bar period to catch slow trend reversals (Turtle rule: entry 24, exit 10) while keeping ATR trailing stop for flash crashes.
